title: SplxAI Probe Platform
description: SplxAI is an end-to-end AI security platform with automated AI red teaming, runtime protection, LLM benchmarking, monitoring, and dynamic remediation — mapping risks to compliance frameworks and securing LLM-powered apps and workflows across 20+ threat categories.

items: Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
